title: Illager War Trireme
description: Adds an Illager War Trireme to all warm ocean biomes
body:
**This mod adds an Illager War Trireme to all warm ocean biomes, filled with Illagers and packed with loot and valuable goods.**
![Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1ff89c9a5e79abf282c273e5c72304515174267.jpeg)

**Spawns:**
- The ship appears in all warm ocean biomes: Lukewarm Ocean, Deep Lukewarm Ocean, and Warm Ocean.
  
![Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/091ad04d2af9bd39f34d3684859e9986d3a634dc.jpeg)


**Illager Crew:**
- The warship is guarded by various Illagers, including regular Pillagers, Vindicators, Evokers, and even the Illusioner, protecting the treasure aboard.
  
  
![Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8ec0d4e4a0860510a645bcd8ac6afd28e4724ee.jpeg)

**Loot:**
- The ship is full of valuable goods, including a captured villager and a loot reward for those who defeat the Illager crew.

   
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8bfbf0a9ec66105a0d98ddc6fc559665b6880e0.jpeg)



Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
